title: 輪の中でも変わらずに

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's lunchtime, and I notice that one corner of the
cafeteria is particularly noisy.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Doberrrr! Lemme have a taste of your strawberry
one!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
No. If you remember, the last time you asked for
"a taste," you went and ate all of mine.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Blow... Blow...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Pearl, stop! STOP! My horoscope was very clear! I'm lucky as long as I avoid sunglasses in motion! So, kindly STOP!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
...Fukukitaru, let me just say this: the only one
who can throw me off my groove is me...

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: Mm hmmmm!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Aaaaaggghhh!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Munch... Munch, munch...
choice_data_list: I'm impressed you can eat with all this going on.
I'm impressed you can eat with all this going on.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Good day to you, Trainer. This requires more
effort than you may think, you know.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Blowing on the hot food to cool it has left me
rather parched.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...It seems Mejiro Bright is so focused on her
grilled carrot that she hasn't noticed the circus
unfolding around her.
choice_data_list: You're steady no matter what, huh?
You're steady no matter what, huh?
Would you like something to drink?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...It seems Mejiro Bright is so focused on her
grilled carrot that she hasn't noticed the circus
unfolding around her.
choice_data_list: You're steady no matter what, huh?
You're steady no matter what, huh?
Would you like something to drink?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Hehe! Did you mean to say "calm"?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Bright! Wanna go threesies on Dober's strawberry
ice cream?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Taiki! Don't bring Bright into this!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Indeed. I'm still eating my grilled carrot, after all.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Please extend another invitation once I've
finished my meal, Taiki.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: What?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Bright! Assist me in halting Pearl's nonsensical
dance number! Please!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Very well. Once I've finished my meal, I shall lend
you a hand. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Blow... Blow... ...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Blow... Blow...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Ack?! I foresee this taking eons!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But Mejiro Bright remains unfazed and finishes
her lunch at her own pace.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Ah, thank you very much! I could go for a nice
cup of tea...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Cough, cough!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Why, yes. My throat's a little dry, that's all.
choice_data_list: I'll go grab that tea for you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I head to the cafeteria's drink bar and pour her a
cup of tea.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Figuring that something cold might be a good
idea, I grab some water as well. When I arrive
back at the table, however...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Great stars! That cup you hold! Could it be?!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Oopsie! You already had your trainer grabbin' a
drink, huh, Bright?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
...Oh dear. I brought one for her too. I should
have asked first.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Looks like all our true colors came out at
once.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...Mejiro Bright's table is now lined with drinks her
friends brought over.
choice_data_list: It seems like everyone really loves you.
It seems like everyone really loves you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! I'd say it's more that everyone is very
kind-hearted than that I'm a figure of adoration.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
That said, one person could hardly drink all this
by herself...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Why don't we have an impromptu tea party right
now? It can be calm, comfortable, and
carefree. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Surrounded by her friends, Mejiro Bright enjoys
not only her lunch but her spontaneous tea party
as well, all at her own pace.
